text: Here, I feel a sense of curiosity and intrigue. The room ahead, lit by a vibrant, almost otherworldly light, contrasts sharply with the dim, utilitarian corridor. The air is marked by a hush one only finds in places dedicated to thought and creation, and the words 'R+D'—research and development—call forth ideas of progress, experimentation, and the unknown. Yet there is also a loneliness, a sense of suspended time, as if I have stumbled into a sanctuary waiting for discovery or a new beginning.
